fields.summary: Specifies arguments used to select and configure a typeface from a font collection or variable font.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontArguments` carries the parameters passed to
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.Clone(SkiaSharp.SKFontArguments)> when creating a customized
copy of a typeface. You can set a font collection index, choose a color palette, provide
palette color overrides, and specify variation design-position coordinates.

This type is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
// Clone a variable font with a specific weight axis value
var args = new SKFontArguments
{
    VariationDesignPosition = new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate[]
    {
        new SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate
        {
            Axis = new SKFourByteTag('w', 'g', 'h', 't'),
            Value = 700f,
        },
    },
};
using var bold = typeface.Clone(args);
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the desired font within a font collection.
fields.value: The index of the font to select from the collection. The default value is 0.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the zero-based index of the color palette to use from the font.
fields.value: The index of the CPAL palette to select. The default value is 0.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the per-color overrides to apply on top of the selected palette.
fields.value: A span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontPaletteOverride" /> entries that replace specific palette color slots.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the variation design-position coordinates that define the desired instance of a variable font.
fields.value: A span of <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationPositionCoordinate" /> values, each specifying an axis tag and a target value.
